_comment: CORE profile (SGO-180) — the LOCKED n+1-human exception for the two CORE repos (tc-pipelines, tc-fitness). Same trustworthy-green gate as the product profile, PLUS at least one human approval, because these repos DEFINE the gate that gates everything else. tc-fitness applies THIS profile; kairix applies main-product.json.
_comment_review: required_approving_review_count >= 1 with require_code_owner_review = true: a change to the control plane cannot merge without a human maintainer. This is the belt-and-braces exception to 0-review — an agent must never be able to weaken the gate that gates it. See governance/CODEOWNERS (two-tier) documented against both profiles.
_comment_required_checks: Identical required set to main-product.json: 'CI gate', 'Independent verifier', 'Mutation', 'SonarCloud scan' (gate-hardening.md). Human review is ADDITIVE here, not a substitute for a green gate.
_comment_no_queue: CORE repos merge DIRECTLY (auto-merge, no queue) — no merge_queue rule. Queueing is scoped to product repos (re-test-vs-tip). Cross-ref: MERGE-QUEUE-D1.md.
_comment_bypass: bypass_actors is EMPTY by design. ADRs: STD-MERGE, RULESET-D1, CODEOWNERS-D1, GATE-HARDEN.
name: main-core
